query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.nome,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.projectId = p.id
WHERE 
  p.nome LIKE 'TEST_%' 
  OR p.nome LIKE 'Projeto Teste%'
  OR p.nome LIKE '%_TEST_%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.nome
ORDER BY total_leads DESC, p.nome;
